title: Replace Context type with any on 3 handler parameters for export compatibility

plan.summary: Fix 3 TS2304 'Cannot find name Context' errors in exported Deno code. The previous changeset added `c: Context` annotations to resolve TS7006 (implicit any), but `Context` is a Hono type injected by the kernel runtime and is not available in the exported Deno project. Changing `c: Context` to `c: any` resolves both TS7006 and TS2304 across both environments. No behavioral changes.

steps.description: Fix getDirections handler: change `c: Context` to `c: any` to resolve TS2304 (req 1).
Fix getWeather handler: change `c: Context` to `c: any` to resolve TS2304 (req 2).
Fix serveApp handler: change `c: Context` to `c: any` to resolve TS2304 (req 3).
Run tests to verify no behavioral regressions.
